question.text: What is the cut-off time for overnight fund transactions?

answer.text: 3 PM for physical applications and 7 PM for online applications
1:30 PM for all transactions regardless of mode
3 PM for all transactions regardless of mode
No cut-off time as overnight funds operate 24/7

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Overnight funds have a dual cut-off: 3 PM for physical applications and an extended 7 PM for online applications. This extended online cut-off recognizes that overnight funds are primarily used by institutional investors who prefer digital channels. **The Trap:** The 7 PM cut-off applies ONLY to online transactions. Physical applications still follow the 3 PM standard. This dual structure is unique to overnight funds. **Cross-Exam Context:** Overnight funds are a SEBI-defined category investing in securities with 1-day maturity. Their extended online cut-off facilitates efficient cash management. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Recommend online transactions for overnight fund investments to take advantage of the extended 7 PM cut-off. Corporate treasuries benefit most from this flexibility for end-of-day cash deployment.
